name: Moon Golf - Auburn
about: Moon Golf - Auburn is a golf simulator and retail facility equipped with Trackman Indoor Golf Simulators. The venue offers club fitting services, allowing customers to test clubs before purchasing using their advanced simulation technology. They provide comprehensive data analysis for club fitting, including clubhead speed, ball speed, spin rate, and launch angle. The facility also offers club repair services and a range of golf equipment, apparel, and accessories from major brands like TaylorMade, Titleist, Callaway, and Ping.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman dual radar technology provides comprehensive swing and ball flight data
Custom club fitting services with data analysis to optimize equipment for individual swings
Ability to test clubs before purchasing in a simulator environment
Certified club fitters with recognized industry credentials

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual Radar technology tracks club movement and full ball flight

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or test clubs from their retail selection before purchasing. They encourage testing clubs in their simulators before buying.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks to the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information about 18-hole playing time is available on their website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendliness or junior programs is provided.
